ingest.description: Route artifact into source + ingestion + durable updates; also plans discovery interviews

shape.description: Turn a problem or objective into a scoped feature brief with hypotheses and metrics

prioritize.description: Choose and apply the right prioritization framework for your stage and context

spec.description: Optional: feature brief to PRD-lite with user stories and acceptance criteria

review.description: Weekly maintenance sweep for stale evidence, strategy drift, and alignment
